summary: A benchmark-only single-driver async ylong concurrency model was tested to isolate runtime spawn scheduling cost by driving multiple in-flight public Client::request futures from one parent future. The focused HTTPS-over-HTTPS-proxy concurrency=8 matrix completed with zero errors, but the candidate failed SOTA gates and was removed: throughput geomean was 0.951x, worst throughput was 0.823x at 1000 requests, p50 max was 1.212x, p95 max was 1.098x, CPU/request geomean was 0.709x, and RSS max was 1.054x. This refutes parent-future single-driver polling as a SOTA-scale solution while preserving ylong_runtime scheduling as a causal narrowing area.

candidate_scope.real_client_path: The candidate still used public ylong_http_client async ClientBuilder, Proxy, Request::builder, Client::request, and response body drain; it changed only how concurrent in-flight request futures were driven inside the benchmark binary.
candidate_scope.reason_for_rejection: Focused HTTPS-over-HTTPS-proxy 1000-request cell regressed relative to libcurl with 0.823x throughput, 1.212x p50, and 1.098x p95 ratios.

commands.name: red_test
commands.result: Failed as expected before implementation because YlongConcurrencyModel::from_value("single-driver") was unsupported.

commands.name: green_test
commands.result: Single-driver parser test passed while the candidate implementation was present.

commands.name: python_cli_green_test
commands.result: Python harness accepted --ylong-concurrency-model single-driver while the candidate was present.

commands.name: candidate_release_build
commands.result: Release benchmark binary built successfully for candidate measurement.

commands.name: focused_benchmark
commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" python3 docs/benchmarks/run_https_proxy_bench.py --baseline libcurl --ylong-client async --ylong-concurrency-model single-driver --scenario https-over-https-proxy --requests 200,1000 --repeats 3 --warmup 50 --concurrency 8 --bench-bin /tmp/ylong_http_target_single_driver_release/release/https_proxy_bench --result-dir docs/benchmarks/results/single-driver-candidate --figure-dir docs/benchmarks/results/single-driver-candidate
commands.result: Focused benchmark completed with zero errors for both ylong_http_client and libcurl.

commands.name: post_removal_rust_test
commands.result: Parser regression test passed after removing the rejected candidate from source.

commands.name: post_removal_python_test
commands.result: Existing Python concurrency-model result-dimension test passed after removing the rejected candidate from source.

claim_boundary: This evidence is a rejected S9 candidate and causal narrowing artifact. It must not be used as SOTA completion evidence, S9 pass evidence, or final-report success evidence.
